Index.title: Utility Hub
Index.description: Find all the tools you need for daily life in one place.
Index.slogan: Every tool you need, instantly free
Index.metaDescription: 40+ free browser-side utilities. No account, no server, no data collection. PDF conversion, QR codes, fintech calculators, developer tools and more.
Index.heroSubtitle: 40+ browser-based utilities. No sign-up, no data collection, no waiting.
Index.heroSubtitleL2: No sign-up, no data collection, no waiting.
Index.browseCategoriesSubtitle: Find the right tool for every task.
Index.featuresSubtitle: Built for privacy, performance, and convenience.
Index.feature1Desc: Everything runs in your browser. Your data never leaves your device, and nothing is stored on our servers.
Index.feature2Desc: No server round-trips. Instant results every time, even on slow connections.
Index.feature3Desc: Every tool is completely free. No sign-up, no paywalls, no credit card needed. Ever.
Index.seoPara1: Utility Hub is a collection of 40+ free online tools designed for daily productivity. From PDF conversion and QR code generation to fintech calculators and developer utilities, everything you need is just one click away.
Index.seoPara2: Unlike other tool websites, Utility Hub processes everything directly in your browser. This means your data stays private, tools load instantly, and nothing is ever sent to a server. Your documents, passwords, and calculations remain 100% on your device.
Index.seoPara3: Whether you're a developer looking for a quick JSON formatter, a student calculating GPA, or a business owner managing fintech calculations, Utility Hub has a tool for you. No account required, no ads, and completely free forever.
Index.footerTagline: All your daily tools, free and private.

UtilitiesBoard.subtitle: A collection of various extra tools you need in your daily life.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.metaDesc: Learn how Utility Hub protects your privacy. All data is processed client-side and never stored on our servers.
PrivacyPolicy.subtitle: How we handle your data at theutilhub.com
PrivacyPolicy.intro: Your privacy is our top priority. Utility Hub is a client-side web application — the vast majority of tools process your data entirely within your browser. Nothing is transmitted to or stored on our servers.
PrivacyPolicy.s1Body: Utility Hub does not collect, store, or transmit:
PrivacyPolicy.s1Li1: Personal identification information (name, email address, phone number)
PrivacyPolicy.s1Li2: Documents or files you process with our tools
PrivacyPolicy.s1Li3: Passwords, credentials, or sensitive text you analyze
PrivacyPolicy.s1Li4: Health, financial, or other personal data you enter into our calculators
PrivacyPolicy.s1Note: All calculations, conversions, and transformations are performed locally in your browser.
PrivacyPolicy.s2Body: Some features use your browser's local storage to enhance your experience:
PrivacyPolicy.s2Li1: URL Shortener: Your shortening history is saved in your browser's localStorage and is never sent to our servers.
PrivacyPolicy.s2Li2: This local data can be cleared at any time from your browser settings and is not accessible to us.
PrivacyPolicy.s3Body: Utility Hub uses cookies and similar tracking technologies. This section explains what cookies are used and why.
PrivacyPolicy.s3fpBody: Utility Hub does not set any first-party cookies for tracking or analytics purposes.
PrivacyPolicy.s3tpBody: We display advertisements provided by Google AdSense. Google uses cookies — including the DoubleClick cookie — to serve ads based on your prior visits to our website or other websites. Google's advertising cookies enable it and its partners to serve personalized ads based on your browsing behavior across the Internet.
PrivacyPolicy.s3optBody: You may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting
PrivacyPolicy.s3gNote: For more information on how Google uses data when you use our site, visit:
PrivacyPolicy.s3mgBody: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect the functionality of some features. For instructions, refer to your browser's help documentation.
PrivacyPolicy.s4Body: Our feedback feature uses Supabase (a third-party service) to receive and store submitted messages. If you choose to submit feedback, only the text you write is sent — no personal identification is collected or required.
PrivacyPolicy.s5Body: Our website integrates with the following third-party services:
PrivacyPolicy.s6Body: Utility Hub is intended for users aged 13 and older. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided personal information, please contact us via our feedback form.
PrivacyPolicy.s7Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
PrivacyPolicy.s8Body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please reach out through our
PrivacyPolicy.s8Suffix: and we will respond as soon as possible.

TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfService.metaDesc: Read the Terms of Service for Utility Hub. Understand the disclaimer, acceptable use policy, and limitations of liability.
TermsOfService.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using theutilhub.com
TermsOfService.intro: By accessing and using Utility Hub ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please discontinue use of the Service.
TermsOfService.s1Body: These Terms of Service constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Utility Hub. Your continued use of the Service signifies your acceptance of any updates to these terms.
TermsOfService.s2Body: Utility Hub provides a free collection of browser-based utility tools including — but not limited to — document converters, financial calculators, developer utilities, and lifestyle tools. The Service is provided for general convenience and informational purposes only.
TermsOfService.s3Body: You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes. You may not:
TermsOfService.s3Li1: Use the Service in any way that violates applicable laws or regulations
TermsOfService.s3Li2: Attempt to interfere with, compromise the integrity or security of the Service
TermsOfService.s3Li3: Use automated means to access the Service in a manner that exceeds reasonable personal use
TermsOfService.s4Title: Disclaimer of Warranties & Limitation of Liability
TermsOfService.s4Warning: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT ANY WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED.
TermsOfService.s4Body: While we strive for accuracy, all tools on Utility Hub — including financial calculators, unit converters, health calculators, GPA converters, and document processors — are provided for informational and reference purposes only. Results should not be relied upon for critical decisions without independent verification.
TermsOfService.s4DisTitle: We expressly disclaim all liability for:
TermsOfService.s4DisLi1: Financial decisions: Any financial, tax, or investment decisions made based on results from our calculators. Always consult a qualified financial advisor.
TermsOfService.s4DisLi2: Health decisions: Any health, medical, or dietary decisions made based on our tools. Always consult a licensed medical professional.
TermsOfService.s4DisLi3: Legal matters: Any legal decisions based on our tools or document processors. Always consult a licensed attorney.
TermsOfService.s4DisLi4: Data accuracy: While we make every effort to ensure accuracy, we make no warranty that results are error-free, complete, or up-to-date.
TermsOfService.s4DisLi5: Data loss: Any loss of data or documents resulting from use of the Service.
TermsOfService.s4FinalWarning: IN NO EVENT SHALL UTILITY HUB BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, EXEMPLARY, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES ARISING FROM YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE.
TermsOfService.s5Body: The Utility Hub website — including its design, code, and original content — is the property of Utility Hub. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without express written permission.
TermsOfService.s6Body: The Service may contain links to third-party websites or integrate third-party services. We are not responsible for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party sites or services.
TermsOfService.s7Body: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate the Service at any time, with or without notice. We may also update these Terms at any time. Your continued use of the Service following any changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
TermsOfService.s8Body: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable law. Any disputes arising in connection with these Terms shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation between the parties.
TermsOfService.s9Body: For questions about these Terms of Service, please reach out through our
TermsOfService.s9Suffix: and we will respond as soon as possible.

SeaMbti.title: Sea Creature MBTI Test
SeaMbti.description: Find out which sea creature matches your personality through 12 fun questions!

questions.q: When a stranger visits your home, how do you (or your pet) react?
questions.a: "Who is it?! Are you here to play?!" Wag tail and greet them first.
questions.b: "Who's that..." Observe from a safe place first.

questions.q: When out in a park or at the beach, what's your style?
questions.a: Approach new friends and mingle actively.
questions.b: Prefer staying close to owner or enjoying solo time.

questions.q: When the owner returns home after going out?
questions.a: Jump around excitedly and welcome them intensely.
questions.b: Just lift head while lying down or approach slowly.

questions.q: When you find a mysterious new object (toy)?
questions.a: Sniff and touch it to realistically figure out what it is.
questions.b: Bite it or play with it in weird ways using imagination.

questions.q: What's your style when taking a walk or walking down the street?
questions.a: Prefer the familiar and comfortable path always taken.
questions.b: Want to explore new alleys and sniff new bushes every day.

questions.q: When you see yourself in a mirror?
questions.a: "That's fake, right?" Coolly ignore because there's no scent.
questions.b: Tilt head in wonder or try to look behind the mirror.

questions.q: When the owner is depressed or crying?
questions.a: Glance over but keep doing own thing, thinking 'They'll be fine'.
questions.b: Approach to lick face or quietly lean beside for comfort.

questions.q: What's the most powerful reward to make you listen?
questions.a: "Delicious treats or clear rewards!" Need a clear purpose.
questions.b: "Warm praise and intense petting!" Emotional connection is key.

questions.q: How do you express when you want something (treats, walk)?
questions.a: Kick the bowl or scratch the door quite directly.
questions.b: Put chin on owner's lap and look with the saddest face.

questions.q: When it's time for meals or walks?
questions.a: Internal alarm clock! Know exactly when and start nagging.
questions.b: Eat when given, go when taken out. Don't mind the time much.

questions.q: When furniture is rearranged or in a strange environment?
questions.a: "Where's my cushion?!" Sensitive to changes and takes time to adapt.
questions.b: "New playground!" Don't mind at all and quickly find a new spot.

questions.q: How do you look on a lazy morning?
questions.a: Wake up early and wake up the owner as per the routine.
questions.b: If owner sleeps in, I roll around and sleep in with them.

Resistor.title: ⚡ Integrated Resistor Calculator
Resistor.description: Decode values in two ways: Color Band resistors or SMD chip codes with real-time graphics.
Resistor.bandInfo: First 2 (4-band) or 3 (5/6-band) represent numbers. Next is the multiplier. Last is the tolerance. 6-band adds temperature coefficient (PPM).
Resistor.smdInfo: 3/4-digit codes use the last digit as 10^x. 'R' is the decimal point. EIA-96 is a high-precision code using 2 numeric index digits and 1 numeric multiplier letter.

KECGrounding.title: ⚡ KEC Grounding & Protective Conductor Sizing Calculator
KECGrounding.subtitle: Based on KEC (Korea Electrical Code) 142.3.2 | Instant Cable Specification Tool for Field Professionals
KECGrounding.calculatorDesc: Choose between phase conductor cross-section or fault current method.
KECGrounding.standardCableNote: ※ Minimum standard cable size equal to or greater than calculated value
KECGrounding.warningText: This calculation is based on KEC minimum requirements. Always consult a qualified electrical engineer for actual installation.
KECGrounding.section1Title: ⚡ What is the KEC Grounding & Protective Conductor Sizing Calculator?
KECGrounding.section1Para1: The KEC Grounding & Protective Conductor Sizing Calculator is a free online tool that quickly and accurately calculates the minimum cross-sectional area for grounding and protective conductors according to Article 142.3.2 of the Korea Electrical Code (KEC). It is designed for immediate use in various professional environments including electrical construction sites, design offices, supervision work, and electrical safety inspections.
KECGrounding.section1Para2: Grounding and protective conductors are critical safety devices in electrical installations, preventing electric shock accidents and fires. KEC regulations strictly define the minimum thickness of these conductors based on either the phase conductor cross-sectional area or fault current and interruption time. This calculator supports both methods.
KECGrounding.section1Para3: All calculations are processed instantly in your browser, providing not only the theoretical minimum value but also automatically recommending the most appropriate standard cable size (1.5SQ to 300SQ) available on the market. Access it quickly from anywhere on smartphones, tablets, or PCs for immediate on-site verification.
KECGrounding.useCase1Desc: Instantly verify grounding conductor size and order materials during wiring design for new buildings or remodeling projects.
KECGrounding.useCase2Desc: Quickly review KEC compliance when designing protective conductors and conducting safety inspections for high-voltage, high-current equipment.
KECGrounding.useCase3Desc: Real-time verification of grounding conductor specifications against regulations during design drawing preparation and field supervision.
KECGrounding.useCase4Desc: Used as a learning tool for electrical certification exam preparation (Electrician, Industrial Engineer, Professional Engineer) and electrical engineering students.
KECGrounding.step1Desc: Choose between phase conductor cross-section (table method) or fault current (formula method) tabs.
KECGrounding.step2Desc: Input phase conductor cross-section (㎟), or fault current (A), interruption time (sec), and material factor (k).
KECGrounding.step3Desc: The theoretical minimum cross-section and the final recommended standard cable size are prominently displayed.
KECGrounding.step4Desc: Order materials or reflect the recommended size in drawings. Consult a qualified electrical engineer if necessary.
KECGrounding.faq1A: KEC (Korea Electrical Code) Article 142 covers protection against electric shock in low-voltage electrical installations. Article 142.3.2 specifically defines the method for calculating minimum cross-sectional area of protective and grounding conductors, presenting both a table based on phase conductor cross-section and a formula based on fault current (S = √(I²t) / k).
KECGrounding.faq2Q: Can I use a larger cable than the calculated value?
KECGrounding.faq2A: Yes, absolutely. KEC regulations specify 'minimum' requirements, so using thicker cables for safety margin is recommended. Considering future expansion possibilities and voltage drop, selecting a generous size is advantageous.
KECGrounding.faq3Q: How do I select the k factor?
KECGrounding.faq3A: The k factor is determined by conductor material (Copper Cu / Aluminum Al) and insulation type (PVC / XLPE). Most building wiring uses Cu-PVC (k=115), while high-temperature environments or high-power equipment often use Cu-XLPE (k=143). Check the cable specification sheet to select the accurate value.
KECGrounding.faq4Q: Which method should I use - phase conductor or fault current?
KECGrounding.faq4A: Generally, the phase conductor cross-section method (table calculation) is simpler and more commonly used in low-voltage wiring design. The fault current method is used when interruption time and fault current values are accurately known, mainly for high-voltage equipment or special environments. Both methods are accurate according to KEC regulations.
KECGrounding.faq5Q: Can I use the results from this tool in official design drawings?
KECGrounding.faq5A: While this tool accurately reflects KEC regulations, official design drawings must be reviewed and approved by a qualified electrical engineer (Professional Engineer or higher). Consider it a reference tool as additional factors such as site conditions, environmental factors, and related regulations may apply.
KECGrounding.disclaimerText: This calculation result is reference information based on Korea Electrical Code (KEC) Article 142.3.2. Always consult a qualified electrical engineer for actual electrical equipment design and installation. The provider assumes no legal liability for any consequences resulting from the use of this tool.

AquariumBioload.title: 🐠 Aquarium Bioload Calculator
AquariumBioload.subtitle: Prevent Overcrowding | Optimal Stocking Level Tool for Aquarists
AquariumBioload.step1Desc: Enter your tank dimensions to calculate total capacity
AquariumBioload.step2Desc: Select fish species and enter quantity
AquariumBioload.alertTankTooSmall: {fishName} requires a minimum tank size of {minSize}L
AquariumBioload.alertSchooling: {fishName} should be kept in groups of at least {minCount} to minimize stress
AquariumBioload.alertCompatibility: ⚠️ Compatibility Warning: Aggressive species may attack or harass peaceful fish
AquariumBioload.alertSafeDesc: Current bioload is at a safe level. Your fish can thrive in this environment.
AquariumBioload.section1Title: 🐠 What is the Aquarium Bioload Calculator?
AquariumBioload.section1Para1: The Aquarium Bioload Calculator is a free online tool for both beginners and experienced aquarists. Enter your tank size, fish species, and quantities to calculate real-time bioload and prevent overcrowding while creating optimal living conditions.
AquariumBioload.section1Para2: Bioload refers to the amount of waste produced by fish, which is a critical factor in water quality management. Excessive bioload rapidly increases ammonia, nitrite, and nitrate levels, harming fish health and potentially leading to fatalities.
AquariumBioload.section1Para3: This calculator features a database of over 15 popular aquarium fish species, considering factors such as bioload per fish, minimum tank size, optimal temperature range, temperament (peaceful/aggressive), and minimum schooling numbers to provide smart alerts.
AquariumBioload.useCase1Desc: First-time aquarium owners can determine appropriate stocking levels and prevent overcrowding.
AquariumBioload.useCase2Desc: Simulate bioload before adding new fish or upgrading your tank.
AquariumBioload.useCase3Desc: Check temperament compatibility and space requirements when keeping multiple species together.
AquariumBioload.useCase4Desc: Quickly diagnose whether overcrowding is the cause of water quality issues.
AquariumBioload.step1HowDesc: Input length, width, and height in cm for automatic liter conversion, or enter volume directly.
AquariumBioload.step2HowDesc: Choose a fish from the dropdown menu, enter quantity, and click 'Add to Tank'. Selected fish appear in the 'Current Tank' list.
AquariumBioload.step3HowDesc: View tank capacity on the progress bar: 0-70% is safe, 71-90% is optimal, 91-100% is maximum, over 100% is overcrowded.
AquariumBioload.step4HowDesc: Automatic warnings appear for issues like insufficient tank size, schooling requirements, or temperament conflicts.
AquariumBioload.faq1A: Bioload is the total amount of waste produced by organisms (mainly fish) in the aquarium. This includes feces, uneaten food, and ammonia from respiration, all of which directly impact water quality. Proper bioload management is essential for maintaining a healthy aquarium.
AquariumBioload.faq2Q: What should I do if the calculator shows over 100%?
AquariumBioload.faq2A: Over 100% indicates overcrowding, which can lead to poor water quality and fish stress. Solutions include: 1) upgrading to a larger tank, 2) reducing fish quantity, 3) installing a more powerful filtration system, or 4) increasing water change frequency (2-3 times weekly).
AquariumBioload.faq3Q: Why is the minimum schooling number important?
AquariumBioload.faq3A: Schooling fish like neon tetras, rasboras, and zebra danios have natural instincts to live in groups. Keeping them alone or in small numbers causes severe stress. They must be kept in groups of at least the recommended minimum to display natural behaviors and remain healthy.
AquariumBioload.faq4Q: Can I keep aggressive and peaceful fish together?
AquariumBioload.faq4A: Generally not recommended. Aggressive species like bettas and cichlids may attack or nip the fins of peaceful species like guppies and neon tetras. If attempting a community tank, provide ample hiding spots and space while closely monitoring individual behavior.
AquariumBioload.faq5A: No. This calculator provides conservative reference information. Actual capacity varies based on filter efficiency (biological filtration capacity), water change frequency (weekly vs. 3x weekly), plant quantity, and keeper experience. Experienced aquarists can maintain higher stocking densities, but beginners should stay within recommended ranges for safety.
AquariumBioload.disclaimerText: This calculator provides conservative reference information. Actual capacity may vary based on filter performance and water change frequency. Fish health and welfare are the keeper's responsibility. The provider assumes no legal liability for any outcomes resulting from the use of this tool. Perform regular water testing and closely monitor fish behavior and health.
AquariumBioload.recommendedTool1: 💧 BMI & Daily Water Intake Calculator - Health Management
AquariumBioload.recommendedTool2: 🐾 Pet Food Portion Calculator - Pet Care

AiSajuPrompt.title: 🔮 AI Saju Fortune Prompt Generator
AiSajuPrompt.subtitle: Convert birth date/time to Saju (Four Pillars) and generate optimized prompts for ChatGPT·Claude·Gemini fortune consultations.
AiSajuPrompt.emptyState: Enter your information and generate a prompt
AiSajuPrompt.tipContent: Copy the generated prompt and paste it into any AI service below to receive professional Saju fortune analysis. Each AI interprets from a slightly different perspective, so comparing multiple results can provide richer insights!
AiSajuPrompt.seoTitle: 🔮 What is AI Saju Fortune Prompt Generator?
AiSajuPrompt.seoDescription: AI Saju Fortune Prompt Generator is a free online tool that converts your birth date and time into accurate Four Pillars (Saju) format and automatically generates high-quality prompts for instant consultation with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other AI services. It bridges traditional Korean fortune-telling with modern AI to make professional Saju analysis accessible to everyone. All birth date information is processed only in your browser—never transmitted to servers—ensuring 100% privacy.
AiSajuPrompt.useCase1Desc: Get professional Saju fortune analysis for free using cutting-edge AI like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini.
AiSajuPrompt.useCase2Desc: Supports both solar and lunar calendar input, with Chinese characters and Korean pronunciation for optimal AI recognition.
AiSajuPrompt.useCase3Desc: Generate prompts tailored to your needs: general fortune, wealth/career, love/marriage, or business strategy.
AiSajuPrompt.useCase4Desc: All calculations and conversions happen in your browser only—birth date information is never sent to or stored on servers.
AiSajuPrompt.howStep1Desc: Choose your gender and select either solar or lunar calendar. For lunar dates, you can also indicate if it's a leap month.
AiSajuPrompt.howStep2Desc: Input your birth year, month, day, and time period. If you don't know the exact time, select 'Time Unknown'.
AiSajuPrompt.howStep3Desc: Select what you want to ask the AI: general fortune, wealth/career, love/marriage, or business strategy.
AiSajuPrompt.howStep4Desc: Click 'Generate Prompt' to create an optimized AI prompt with your Four Pillars data. Copy it and paste into your preferred AI service.
AiSajuPrompt.faq1Q: Which AI (Gemini, ChatGPT, Claude) gives the best Saju reading?
AiSajuPrompt.faq1A: Each AI interprets with a slightly different style. ChatGPT tends to be conversational and friendly, Claude is logical and structured, and Gemini offers creative and diverse perspectives. Comparing results from multiple AIs can provide richer insights.
AiSajuPrompt.faq2Q: Is my birth date information stored on servers?
AiSajuPrompt.faq2A: Absolutely not! All Saju calculations and prompt generation happen entirely in your browser. No personal information is ever transmitted to servers. 100% privacy is guaranteed.
AiSajuPrompt.faq3Q: What if I don't know my birth time?
AiSajuPrompt.faq3A: Simply select 'Time Unknown'. The analysis will proceed with Year, Month, and Day Pillars only (excluding the Hour Pillar), which still provides meaningful results. However, the Hour Pillar influences detailed personality traits and time-specific fortune, so checking with parents is recommended if possible.
AiSajuPrompt.faq4Q: Should I enter lunar or solar calendar?
AiSajuPrompt.faq4A: Use whichever calendar you know. Most people born after the 1980s use the solar calendar, while earlier generations often use lunar. Birth dates on ID cards are solar.
AiSajuPrompt.faq5A: While AI has learned vast amounts of fortune-telling data, it cannot fully replace a 30-year expert's direct consultation. Use AI analysis as reference, and for major life decisions, consider consulting a professional fortune-teller in parallel. This tool focuses on generating high-quality prompts to maximize AI consultation quality.
AiSajuPrompt.disclaimerText: This tool is a technical service that converts Four Pillars (Saju) data into AI prompt format and does not directly provide fortune-telling or consultation services. AI analysis results are for reference only. For major life decisions (marriage, career change, investments), please consult a professional fortune-teller. Legal responsibility for outcomes derived from AI analysis using generated prompts lies solely with the user. The service provider assumes no liability for any results.
